subcodes.first_line: O thou who circlest round the precincts of the Abhá throng! Praise be to God that through His grace and bounty thou hast been enabled to prostrate thyself at the Sacred Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طائف حول مطاف ملا ابهی الحمد لله بفضل و جود موید بسجود در عتبه مقدسه گشتی و
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @praise and encouragement, @Shrines and Holy places, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
